column1: # NOTE: this is NOT the diacritic ISO 9:1995 standard (#94). translit table
# values are ASCII-only by design (enforced by build.rs), so this emits ASCII
# digraphs (ж→zh, ч→ch, ш→sh) rather than ISO 9's ž/č/š. It is a consistent,
# scholarly ASCII scheme — do not rely on it for ISO 9-conformant output.
